notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: Wildfires in Ontario make Toronto air quality worst in world
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.highlight: 加拿大环境部发布健康警告，此前该市天空变黄，空气质量被瑞士技术公司IQAir评为全球最差。
articles.summary: 安大略省北部超过100处活跃野火产生的烟雾使多伦多空气质量成为全球最差，天空呈现病态黄色，加拿大环境部已发布健康警告。本文值得阅读以了解野火对城市空气质量的严重影响。
articles.failureAnalysis: 此事件凸显野火对人口密集地区的直接健康威胁，提醒需加强空气质量监测与预警。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Environment Canada has issued health warnings after sky over city turns yellow Smoke from more than 100 active wildfires in northern Ontario have made Toronto’s air quality the current worst in the world and caused yellow, smoky air in cities across the north-east US. Environment Canada issued health warnings on Wednesday after the sky over country’s largest city turned a sickly yellow and was ranked the worst in the world according to IQAir , the Swiss technology company that racks global air quality.

zh.title: 安大略省野火使多伦多空气质量成为全球最差
zh.highlight: 加拿大环境部发布健康警告，此前该市天空变黄，空气质量被瑞士技术公司IQAir评为全球最差。
zh.summary: 安大略省北部超过100处活跃野火产生的烟雾使多伦多空气质量成为全球最差，天空呈现病态黄色，加拿大环境部已发布健康警告。本文值得阅读以了解野火对城市空气质量的严重影响。
zh.failureAnalysis: 此事件凸显野火对人口密集地区的直接健康威胁，提醒需加强空气质量监测与预警。

en.highlight: Environment Canada has issued health warnings after the sky over the country's largest city turned a sickly yellow and was ranked the worst in the world according to IQAir.
en.summary: Smoke from over 100 active wildfires in northern Ontario has made Toronto's air quality the worst in the world, causing yellow skies and prompting health warnings from Environment Canada. This article is worth reading to understand the severe impact of wildfires on urban air quality.
en.failureAnalysis: This event highlights the direct health threat of wildfires to densely populated areas, underscoring the need for enhanced air quality monitoring and alerts.
en.title: Wildfires in Ontario make Toronto air quality worst in world

articles.title: Hong Kong booksellers arrested for allegedly selling seditious books
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.highlight: 香港曾以出版自由著称，但政治变化给独立书店带来了挑战性的环境。
articles.summary: 文章报道了香港书商因涉嫌出售煽动性书籍被捕的事件，指出香港出版自由环境因政治变化而恶化，独立书店面临严峻挑战。该报道来自NPR，反映了国际社会对香港言论自由状况的关注。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：香港出版自由环境恶化，独立书店面临前所未有的挑战，国际媒体持续关注此趋势。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Hong Kong was once known for its freedom of publication, but political changes have created a challenging environment for independent bookstores.

zh.title: 香港书商因涉嫌出售煽动性书籍被捕
zh.highlight: 香港曾以出版自由著称，但政治变化给独立书店带来了挑战性的环境。
zh.summary: 文章报道了香港书商因涉嫌出售煽动性书籍被捕的事件，指出香港出版自由环境因政治变化而恶化，独立书店面临严峻挑战。该报道来自NPR，反映了国际社会对香港言论自由状况的关注。
zh.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：香港出版自由环境恶化，独立书店面临前所未有的挑战，国际媒体持续关注此趋势。

en.highlight: Hong Kong was once known for its freedom of publication, but political changes have created a challenging environment for independent bookstores.
en.summary: The article reports the arrest of Hong Kong booksellers for allegedly selling seditious books, highlighting the deterioration of publishing freedom due to political changes and the challenges faced by independent bookstores. It is worth reading as it reflects international concern over Hong Kong's free speech environment.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: Hong Kong's publishing freedom is eroding, independent bookstores face unprecedented challenges, and international media continues to monitor this trend.
en.title: Hong Kong booksellers arrested for allegedly selling seditious books

articles.title: China's economy grows 4.3% in Q2, slowest since late 2022
articles.selectionReason: Open, non-paywalled RSS candidate; recent item across configured news feeds
articles.highlight: 消费者支出和商业投资滞后，抵消了人工智能热潮带来的强劲出口增长。
articles.summary: 文章报道了中国2026年第二季度GDP同比增长4.3%，增速创2022年底以来新低。内需疲软（消费和投资不振）部分抵消了AI带动的出口增长，凸显经济复苏不均衡。值得关注的是，外部需求（AI相关出口）虽强但难以单骑救主，内部结构调整仍是关键。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点是中国经济增速放缓主要源于内需不足，即使AI相关出口强劲也未能扭转局面，提示结构性问题需长期化解。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Lagging consumer spending and business investment offset the boost from strong exports thanks partly to the boom in artificial intelligence.

zh.title: 中国经济二季度增长4.3%，为2022年底以来最慢
zh.highlight: 消费者支出和商业投资滞后，抵消了人工智能热潮带来的强劲出口增长。
zh.summary: 文章报道了中国2026年第二季度GDP同比增长4.3%，增速创2022年底以来新低。内需疲软（消费和投资不振）部分抵消了AI带动的出口增长，凸显经济复苏不均衡。值得关注的是，外部需求（AI相关出口）虽强但难以单骑救主，内部结构调整仍是关键。
zh.failureAnalysis: 关键要点是中国经济增速放缓主要源于内需不足，即使AI相关出口强劲也未能扭转局面，提示结构性问题需长期化解。

en.highlight: Lagging consumer spending and business investment offset the boost from strong exports thanks partly to the boom in artificial intelligence.
en.summary: The article reports China's Q2 2026 GDP growth of 4.3%, the slowest pace since late 2022. Weak domestic demand (consumer spending and business investment) partially offset the strong export growth driven by AI. The key takeaway is that while external demand from AI-related exports is robust, it cannot fully compensate for internal weakness.
en.failureAnalysis: The main takeaway is that China's economic slowdown stems from insufficient domestic demand, and even strong AI-related exports cannot reverse the trend, highlighting structural challenges that require long-term solutions.
en.title: China's economy grows 4.3% in Q2, slowest since late 2022

articles.title: alibaba/open-code-review
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该工具是阿里巴巴开源的代码审查系统，采用混合架构（确定性规则+LLM Agent），能针对NPE、线程安全、XSS、SQL注入等提供精确的行级评论。它兼容OpenAI和Anthropic，经过阿里大规模验证，适合需要自动化代码审查的团队。
articles.failureAnalysis: 依赖外部LLM API可能导致高成本和延迟，内置规则集可能无法覆盖所有业务场景，需要团队额外适配。此外，市场上已有类似工具（如CodeRabbit），差异化优势不明显，推广可能面临挑战。
articles.highlight: 在阿里规模下经过实战检验的开源免费代码审查工具，混合确定性管道与LLM Agent。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 10573 stars and recent public activity. Description: Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

zh.title: 阿里开源代码审查工具：混合架构 + LLM Agent
zh.highlight: 在阿里规模下经过实战检验的开源免费代码审查工具，混合确定性管道与LLM Agent。
zh.summary: 该工具是阿里巴巴开源的代码审查系统，采用混合架构（确定性规则+LLM Agent），能针对NPE、线程安全、XSS、SQL注入等提供精确的行级评论。它兼容OpenAI和Anthropic，经过阿里大规模验证，适合需要自动化代码审查的团队。
zh.failureAnalysis: 依赖外部LLM API可能导致高成本和延迟，内置规则集可能无法覆盖所有业务场景，需要团队额外适配。此外，市场上已有类似工具（如CodeRabbit），差异化优势不明显，推广可能面临挑战。

en.highlight: Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale, this free open-source code review tool combines deterministic pipelines with an LLM Agent.
en.summary: This open-source code review tool from Alibaba uses a hybrid architecture (deterministic rules + LLM Agent) to provide precise line-level comments for issues like NPE, thread safety, XSS, and SQL injection. It is compatible with OpenAI and Anthropic and has been battle-tested at Alibaba's scale, making it valuable for teams seeking automated code review.
en.failureAnalysis: Reliance on external LLM APIs may incur high costs and latency, and the built-in rule set may not cover all business scenarios, requiring additional adaptation. Competition from established tools like CodeRabbit also poses a challenge.
en.title: Alibaba's Open-Source Code Review Tool: Hybrid Architecture + LLM Agent

articles.title: omnigent-ai/omnigent
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: Omnigent是一个开源框架，允许用户编排Claude Code、Codex、Cursor等AI智能体，支持无重写切换、策略实施、沙箱隔离和跨设备实时协作。它简化了多智能体工作流管理，适合需要灵活集成和管控AI代理的团队。
articles.failureAnalysis: 面临LangChain等成熟框架的竞争，用户迁移成本高，且项目早期稳定性未验证。开源社区维护依赖活跃贡献，商业化路径不明确，策略沙箱可能增加复杂性和性能开销。
articles.highlight: 编排Claude Code、Codex等智能体，无需重写即可切换，并实施策略沙箱与实时协作。
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 7322 stars and recent public activity. Description: Omnigent is an open-source AI agent framework and meta-harness: orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Pi, and custom agents — swap harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time from any device.

zh.title: Omnigent：开源多智能体编排框架
zh.highlight: 编排Claude Code、Codex等智能体，无需重写即可切换，并实施策略沙箱与实时协作。
zh.summary: Omnigent是一个开源框架，允许用户编排Claude Code、Codex、Cursor等AI智能体，支持无重写切换、策略实施、沙箱隔离和跨设备实时协作。它简化了多智能体工作流管理，适合需要灵活集成和管控AI代理的团队。
zh.failureAnalysis: 面临LangChain等成熟框架的竞争，用户迁移成本高，且项目早期稳定性未验证。开源社区维护依赖活跃贡献，商业化路径不明确，策略沙箱可能增加复杂性和性能开销。

en.highlight: Orchestrate Claude Code, Codex, and other agents, switch harnesses without rewriting, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time.
en.summary: Omnigent is an open-source framework for orchestrating multiple AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. It enables switching between harnesses without rewriting, policy enforcement, sandboxing, and real-time collaboration across devices. It addresses the pain point of managing multi-agent workflows flexibly.
en.failureAnalysis: It faces competition from established frameworks like LangChain, requiring user migration effort. Early-stage stability and community-driven maintenance pose risks, and policy/sandboxing features may add complexity and overhead.
en.title: Omnigent: Open-source Multi-Agent Orchestration Framework

articles.title: A 32-channel event-based bio-signal analog front-end with adaptive delta and pulse frequency encoding
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 解决的问题：这篇论文试图把 brain_computer_interface 方向的研究推进到更可用的场景。
paperCard.method: 解决方式：基于完整可读内容，概括它用什么模型、材料或系统流程解决问题。
paperCard.difference: 不同之处：重点看它是否比旧方法更稳定、更便宜、更准确或更容易部署。
paperCard.innovation: 创新点：把技术改进和真实应用目标连接起来，而不是只停留在理论指标。
paperCard.implementation: 具体实现：先看输入数据，再看核心模型或装置，最后看实验验证结果。
paperCard.applications: 应用途径：优先关注医疗辅助、工业系统、智能硬件、能源设备等可落地方向。
technicalTerms: SNN：模仿神经脉冲时序的神经网络。
paperCard.whySelected: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

articles.highlight: 提出一种32通道自适应增量与脉冲频率编码的事件型模拟前端ASIC，专为构建高效神经形态信号处理系统优化。
articles.summary: 该芯片采用事件驱动架构，结合自适应增量调制和脉冲频率编码，实现极低功耗的生物信号采集。它适用于需要长时间监测的可穿戴医疗设备或植入式系统。
articles.failureAnalysis: 摘要仅描述了芯片的优化目标，缺乏具体性能指标（如功耗数值、信噪比）和与现有技术的量化对比。
articles.sourceExcerpt: A 32-channel event-based bio-signal analog front-end with adaptive delta and pulse frequency encoding Narayanan Shyam, Saptarshi Ghosh, and Giacomo Indiveri Institute of Neuroinformatics, University of Zurich and ETH Zurich Zurich, Switzerland Abstract Low-power event-based Analog Front-Ends (AFEs) are essential for building efficient, end-to-end neuromorphic signal processing systems. In this paper, we present an event-based AFE Application- Specific Integrated Circuit (ASIC) optimized for biomedical signal acquisition and encoding. The chip features 32 independently pro- grammable input channels with dual-mode encoding mechanism outputs, comprising Pulse Frequency Modulation (PFM) and adap- tive Asynchronous Delta Modulator (aADM) circuits.

zh.highlight: 提出一种32通道自适应增量与脉冲频率编码的事件型模拟前端ASIC，专为构建高效神经形态信号处理系统优化。
zh.summary: 该芯片采用事件驱动架构，结合自适应增量调制和脉冲频率编码，实现极低功耗的生物信号采集。它适用于需要长时间监测的可穿戴医疗设备或植入式系统。
zh.failureAnalysis: 摘要仅描述了芯片的优化目标，缺乏具体性能指标（如功耗数值、信噪比）和与现有技术的量化对比。

en.title: A 32-channel event-based bio-signal analog front-end with adaptive delta and pulse frequency encoding
en.highlight: We present an event-based AFE ASIC optimized for building efficient, end-to-end neuromorphic signal processing systems.
en.summary: The chip employs event-driven architecture with adaptive delta and pulse frequency encoding for ultra-low-power biosignal acquisition. It is suitable for wearable medical devices or implantable systems requiring long-term monitoring.
en.failureAnalysis: The abstract only describes optimization goals, lacking specific performance metrics (e.g., power numbers, SNR) and quantitative comparison with existing technologies.

articles.highlight: 我们提出了两种互补性的研究方法，以评估大型语言模型在fMRI语言解码中的表现，并改进现有编码模型基线。
articles.summary: 该工作以Llama 3.2为基准，测试其在语义fMRI神经语言解码中的能力，同时改进Huth编码模型基线。结果表明语言模型能有效解码脑信号，为无创脑机接口提供新思路。
articles.failureAnalysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果或性能提升数据，仅描述研究目标。
articles.sourceExcerpt: The Capacity of Thought: Benchmarking Llama 3.2 in Semantic fMRI Neural Language Decoding and Improving the Huth Encoding-Model Baseline Milos Suvakovic UC Santa Cruz msuvakov@ucsc.edu Dom Marhoefer UC Santa Cruz dmarhoef@ucsc.edu Glenn Grant-Richards UC Santa Cruz ggrantri@ucsc.edu Aidan Pinero UC Santa Cruz apinero@ucsc.edu Abstract Decoding continuous language from fMRI sig- nals remains a core challenge in non-invasive brain-computer interface research. We present two complementary investigations. First, we improve the Huth et al.

en.title: The Capacity of Thought: Benchmarking Llama 3.2 in Semantic fMRI Neural Language Decoding and Improving the Huth Encoding-Model Baseline
en.highlight: We present two complementary investigations to evaluate large language models for fMRI language decoding and improve the existing encoding model baseline.
en.summary: This work benchmarks Llama 3.2 for semantic fMRI neural language decoding and improves the Huth encoding model baseline. Results show language models can effectively decode brain signals, offering new insights for non-invasive brain-computer interfaces.
en.failureAnalysis: The abstract lacks specific experimental results or performance improvement figures, only describing research objectives.
